title: SUITE_SITE_SUITE_5_1_91_NIKA_RELEASE_2026-05-22.md
text:
# Suite Site Suite 5.1.91 Nika Release

- Data: `2026-05-22`
- Versione plugin: `5.1.91`

## Contenuto principale

Release della Site Suite con:

- template nuovo `nika_haircare_product`
- stile `nika_haircare`
- renderer dedicato per product page haircare
- flusso `Template WaaS -> pagina WordPress modificabile` giĂ  presente

## Pacchetti

- Zip installabile: `dist/skinharmony-site-suite-5.1.91.zip`
- Zip latest: `dist/skinharmony-site-suite.zip`
- Release descrittiva: `reports/wordpress/releases/skinharmony-site-suite-5.1.91-nika-haircare-template.zip`

## Verifiche

- `php -l wordpress/plugins/skinharmony-site-suite/skinharmony-site-suite.php` -> `No syntax errors detected`
- `node scripts/preflight_wp_site_suite_release.js --version=5.1.91` -> `ok: true`

## Hash

- `sha256`: `7663c3d6b5b2d7ddf2f76c3082cc090951fa1cf294e41743fc1ac738ce6f456b`
